vocab.meaning: cảnh tượng đẹp đến ngạt thở
vocab.example: Whenever the bus climbs higher into the mountains, it reveals a breathtaking vista that I simply can't look away from.

vocab.meaning: phông nền/khung cảnh phía sau hùng vĩ
vocab.example: Traveling through the countryside provides a spectacular backdrop of rolling hills and lush greenery.

vocab.meaning: ngắm nhìn thế giới trôi qua (một cách thư thái)
vocab.example: I find it incredibly therapeutic to just sit by the window and watch the world go by during a long car journey.

vocab.meaning: vùng quê bình dị, đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The route to my hometown passes through some truly idyllic countryside, filled with quaint farmhouse and golden fields.

vocab.meaning: xa lộ đơn điệu, nhàm chán
vocab.example: If we are just driving along a monotonous highway with nothing but concrete walls, I’d rather lose myself in a book.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
vocab.example: Looking out the window allows me to observe the transition from the dense urban sprawl to the open natural spaces.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh đẹp như trong tranh
vocab.example: The coastal road offers some of the most picturesque scenery I’ve ever encountered while traveling by bus.

vocab.meaning: bị mê hoặc/thu hút mãnh liệt bởi
vocab.example: I’m often mesmerized by the way the sunlight dances on the river as we drive alongside it.

vocab.meaning: cảnh vật vụt sáng/lướt qua nhanh
vocab.example: There is something poetic about the fleeting landscape that disappears behind you as the car picks up speed.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
vocab.example: I always try to snag a front-row seat on the top deck of the bus to get an uninterrupted view of the surroundings.
